message:
feat(native_events): collapse dual-runtime seams to asupersync-only (wa-k0tk5)

Remove the three `#[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]` / `#[cfg(not(...))]`
seams in native_events.rs by making the module's feature gate
(`native-wezterm`) require `asupersync-runtime`. The non-asupersync branches
were migration debt per AGENTS.md ("direct tokio usage is forbidden") and
are now gone.

Changes:
- crates/frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml: native-wezterm now requires
  asupersync-runtime (was empty feature list)
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/native_events.rs:
  - dispatch_event_with_timeout: remove cfg split, use asupersync Cx
    reserve/commit unconditionally
  - test helpers recv_next/send_value: remove cfg split, use asupersync
    Cx unconditionally
  - add dispatch_event_runs_deterministically_under_labruntime: new
    LabRuntime seed-locked test (seed 0xF734_5E42_A11D_0515) proving
    virtual-time scheduling of the dispatch path; deadlocks/step-explodes
    if a tokio-shaped assumption sneaks back in

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc1-target):
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm: pass
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib (default features): pass
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm native_events::: 75/75 pass (74 existing + 1 new LabRuntime)
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test proptest_native_events --no-default-features --features native-wezterm: 31/31 pass
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --bench native_events_latency --features native-wezterm: pass
- cargo clippy --no-deps -p frankenterm-core --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm -- -D warnings: clean
- bash scripts/check_no_runtime_regression.sh: ft-xbnl0.2.6 gate still passes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
